caribbean.headline: Caribbean Sees Rising Winds
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing 20 kt winds with 5.2 ft wave heights and an 83% rain probability, while St. Lucia has 14 kt winds. I expect the Lesser Antilles to see significant weather impacts today, particularly in Barbados with its high rain probability and moderate winds.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 20 kt winds with a 38% rain probability and 4.3 ft wave heights, while nearby ports are relatively calm. Cadiz, in the Western Mediterranean, has significantly lighter conditions with max winds of 11 kt and less than 10% rain probability.
